text: I am struck by a sense of curiosity and possibility. The environment is orderly yet playful, with bold colors and the acronym R+D—research and development—prominently featured on the wall. It feels like a space dedicated to innovation and discovery, which makes me reflect on the ever-shifting nature of knowledge and progress. I am inspired by the blend of technology and human thought evident here, and there is a gentle hum of anticipation as if new ideas are just waiting to be found.
